description: LanceDB is a multimodal lakehouse for AI data workflows, combining vectors, metadata, and source data in a unified table format. It offers an embedded open-source library for local/object-storage use and an Enterprise deployment option for remote, managed or private-cloud access.
summary: LanceDB exposes a documented Enterprise REST API plus official SDK clients (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Java); authentication is via Enterprise API keys, and some SDKs also support OAuth client credentials or Azure managed identity.

surfaces.command: lancedb (library clients: Python, TypeScript, Rust, Java)
surfaces.name: LanceDB SDKs
